_meta.null_signal_reason: : Weekly bundle has 7 developments on governance tools and US policy framework.
_meta.cycle_disposition_reason: : Weekly research contains substantive developments on AI governance tools and US National Policy Framework.

lead_signal.headline: White House National Policy Framework for AI proposes unified US legislation.
lead_signal.body: Framework released March 20, 2026 outlines legislative recommendations for coherent national AI governance beyond executive orders. Marks potential transition to durable regulation amid global fragmentation. Influences federal and state approaches.

module_0.title: White House National Policy Framework for AI proposes unified US legislation.
module_0.body: Framework released March 20, 2026 outlines legislative recommendations for coherent national AI governance. Marks step toward durable regulation beyond executive orders. Signals US push for sovereignty amid EU AI Act compliance race. Watch legislative uptake in Congress.

vectors.summary: Governance tools support EU AI Act compliance but no harmonised standards ahead of deadlines.
vectors.asymmetric: Arbitrage for private standards in compliance vacuum.
